title: Smoothie's Pvp Essentials
description: A pack which optimizes every pvp gamemode
body:
A **texture pack** That includes Everything you would need For your Next Fight!All the Features it Includes are Listed **Below**:<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/X-Cy7j3gD1o" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



-   **Smaller Shield,Items** 
-   **Small Totem Pop**
-   **Custom Crosshair**
-   **Custom Armour Texture**
-   **Better Enchant Glint**
-   **No Explosion Particles**
-   **Small Swords**
-   **Better Redstone Overlay(DISPLAYS REDSONE SIGNAL ON DUST)**
-   **Transparent/Dark GUI**

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95cd9af13c20b86927e3f7b20ec226f1ce6a847b.png)

The Texture Pack Will Continuously be updated for The user's Best PVP Experience!
Dm Me On Discord For Advice And Support!User:2mpm_
